description: Event handler for removing skills from entities during tactical combat. Supports multiple trigger modes and skill targeting via template ID matching.

fields_analyzed.name: OwningSkill
fields_analyzed.description: Pointer to the Skill instance that owns this handler. Used to access the entity and call OnEffectApplied after removal completes.

fields_analyzed.name: EffectData
fields_analyzed.description: Pointer to the RemoveSkill effect template data. Contains TriggerMode and SkillsToRemove list. Set during Create factory method.

fields_analyzed.name: TriggerMode
fields_analyzed.description: Determines when skill removal is triggered. Values: 0=OnUse, 1=OnAdded, 2=OnRemoved, 3=OnEffectApplied. Each handler callback checks this value.

fields_analyzed.name: SkillsToRemove
fields_analyzed.description: List of skill templates specifying which skills should be removed. Skills are matched by comparing DataTemplate.GetID with target skill IDs.

fields_analyzed.name: IsRemoved
fields_analyzed.description: Flag on BaseSkill indicating the skill has been marked for removal. Checked by ShouldSkillBeRemoved to avoid double-processing. Set by RemoveSelf.

fields_analyzed.name: SkillsList
fields_analyzed.description: The list of skills on the entity's skill container. Iterated during RemoveSkills to find matching skills.

methods.name: Create
methods.description: Factory method that creates a RemoveSkillHandler instance. Stores effect data at handler+0x18.

methods.name: OnUse
methods.description: Called when skill is used. If TriggerMode==0, calls RemoveSkills. Also plays muzzle VFX on executing elements.

methods.name: OnAdded
methods.description: Called when effect is added. If TriggerMode==1, calls RemoveSkills.

methods.name: OnRemoved
methods.description: Called when effect is removed. If TriggerMode==2, calls RemoveSkills.

methods.name: OnEffectApplied
methods.description: Called when effect is applied. If TriggerMode==3, calls RemoveSkills.

methods.name: RemoveSkills
methods.description: Core removal logic. Gets entity's SkillContainer, iterates all skills, checks ShouldSkillBeRemoved for each, calls RemoveSelf on matches.

methods.name: ShouldSkillBeRemoved
methods.description: Checks if a specific skill should be removed. Returns false if already removed. Iterates SkillsToRemove list comparing template IDs.

methods.name: IsUsable
methods.description: Returns true only if TriggerMode==0 (OnUse) and at least one skill matches removal criteria.

methods.name: IsHidden
methods.description: Returns true if TriggerMode!=0 or no removable skills exist. Effect is only visible when usable.

key_discoveries.details: The TriggerMode field at Effect+0x58 controls when removal occurs: 0=OnUse (player activates), 1=OnAdded (when skill is granted), 2=OnRemoved (when skill is taken away), 3=OnEffectApplied (when effect resolves).
Skills are identified for removal by comparing their template IDs (via DataTemplate.GetID) against entries in the SkillsToRemove list. This allows targeting specific skills by data definition.
Skills are not immediately destroyed. Instead, RemoveSelf sets IsRemoved flag at BaseSkill+0x39, allowing the system to clean up safely during the next appropriate update cycle.
Handler accesses entity via: Handler -> OwningSkill (0x10) -> GetEntity() -> GetSkillContainer() (vtable 0x3e8/0x3f0) -> Skills list (0x18).
OnUse method plays muzzle effects on executing elements when TriggerMode is not 0, using GetMuzzleEffect and InstantiateEffect from PooledObjects.
A parallel handler RemoveDefectHandler exists at 0x1807197d0 that uses scoring (GetScore) to select defects for removal based on DefectTemplate matching and priority values.
